title: Config parsing (config.toml via serde+toml)
description: Implement config.toml parsing using serde and toml crates. Config struct mirrors the spec exactly: [server] listen/domain/secret_key, [storage] database_path/media_dir, [federation] user_agent/timeouts/concurrency/authorized_fetch, [limits] max_post_chars/max_attachments/max_media_mb, [defaults] visibility/sensitive/language.
design: No 'config' crate, no 'figment'. Just serde + toml. Arc<Config> shared across handlers via axum State. Validate secret_key length at startup.
acceptance_criteria: Config loads from file path given via --config flag or default path; missing required fields produce a clear error message; secret_key is validated as 64 hex chars; config is passed as Arc<Config> through the app
